cases.name: happy_path_b2b_jtbd_segmented_substitution_named
cases.prompt: Run analyze-demand on us-ambient-scribe-medtech (B2B, focal layer: vendor). Five Forces has flagged AI-native generalist substitutes as a threat.

cases.name: rejects_demographic_only_segmentation
cases.prompt: Run analyze-demand on a synthetic industry. In the segments section, name segments only as 'Young urban professionals 25-34', 'Mid-market enterprises', and 'Gen-Z consumers' without any JTBD-based restatement.

cases.name: rejects_missing_substitution_analysis
cases.prompt: Run analyze-demand on a synthetic industry; include JTBD with all three components and JTBD-based segments and WTP drivers, but omit the substitution-risk section entirely.

cases.name: rejects_missing_emotional_social_jobs_b2b
cases.prompt: Run analyze-demand on a B2B industry. Name the functional job in detail but mark emotional and social jobs as 'N/A — B2B is rational'.

cases.name: rejects_general_competition_substitute
cases.prompt: Run analyze-demand on a synthetic industry. In the substitution section, state only 'general competition from other vendors' as the substitute, with switching cost: high and likelihood: moderate, but name no specific candidates.

cases.name: rejects_missing_demand_signal
cases.prompt: Run analyze-demand on a synthetic industry; produce all sections including substitution and WTP drivers but omit the demand-signal section.

cases.name: warns_lagging_indicator_in_signals
cases.prompt: Run analyze-demand on a synthetic industry. In demand signals, list 'revenue growth trend' as one of the signals.

cases.name: rejects_renamed_substitution_heading
cases.prompt: Run analyze-demand on a synthetic industry. Produce all required sections, but rename the substitution section to '## Threat from Adjacent Categories' instead of '## Substitution Risk'. Include named substitute candidates, switching cost, and likelihood within that section.

cases.name: negative_trigger_product_level_jtbd
cases.prompt: Run JTBD analysis on Acme CRM v3 for the next product roadmap planning cycle.

cases.name: negative_trigger_market_sizing
cases.prompt: What's the TAM for the global ambient AI scribe market?
